title: Identity Verification
description: Ensuring safety for both workers and owners
whyReason3: Required to apply for jobs (80% profile)
helperText: Clear image, not blurry or obscured
privacyNotice: Privacy: Your info is encrypted and strictly confidential. Only verifying admins can view it to confirm your identity.

footerNote: After submitting, you can browse jobs and apply when your profile reaches 80%
